description: Routing policy for the post-fiat-signals crypto producer. Derived from 2,128 resolved signals across 7-day forward-test window (March 19-26, 2026). Regime: SYSTEMIC. Evidence: proof_surface.json, weak_symbol_evaluator.py, signal_voi_router.py.
evidence_source: proof_surface.json 2,128 resolved signals, SYSTEMIC regime, March 19-26 2026

regime_gate.description: EARNINGS excluded: short duration + event-driven, unreliable. NEUTRAL is most actionable (82% hit rate for CRYPTO_LEADS). SYSTEMIC = NO_TRADE discipline but signals still produced for record-keeping.

duration_gate.description: 38.6% accuracy at 10-15d vs 58.9% at 15d+. Duration gating is the single largest accuracy lever. Structural effect, not overfit.

confidence_gate.description: Below 0.30, even correct signals generate negligible karma. Conservative floor.

voi_gate.description: Core decision gate: only emit if E[karma|send] > 0. Hazard adjustment disabled because primary routing uses duration buckets directly.

weak_symbol_gate.description: Symbols with MODERATE+ weakness get routed through intervention policy. MILD weakness passes through.

BTC.description: BTC: marginal accuracy (50.9%). Early-duration VOI near zero. Passes duration gate at 15d.

ETH.description: ETH: strongest performer (54.3%). Positive VOI across all duration buckets.

SOL.description: SOL: SEVERE weakness (0.6979). Accuracy 44.0%, CI excludes 50%. INVERT justified (p=0.0001). Duration gate disabled for SOL because inversion changes the accuracy profile.

LINK.description: LINK: strongest overall (56.6%). Positive VOI everywhere. Duration gate still applies because early-duration accuracy is lower.
